plan_metadata.name: Sample Large Notification Bot Remote Debug Only

steps.description: Type "large notification bot" into the search/filter input field at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code, to filter available sample projects.

Click the "Create" button for the "Large Scale Notification" sample in the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
And input ${{var:app_name:large-scale-notification}} into the run time variable.

Click the "Accounts" icon in the Visual Studio Code activity bar to open the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit accounts panel. The red crosshair indicates the user icon (person silhouette) on the vertical left-side navigation menu.
Click the "Launch Remote (Edge)" dropdown in the RUN AND DEBUG section of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Launch Remote (Chrome)" option in the run configuration dropdown within the Visual Studio Code Debug sidebar.
Click the "Start Debugging (F5)" button in the Run and Debug panel at the top left of the Visual Studio Code interface.

@code get the BOT_FUNCTION_ENDPOINT value in file: "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}}/env/.env.dev".
 send request to "BOT_FUNCTION_ENDPOINT/api/notification"
